title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXV. Jingles.
content:
Deedle, deedle, dumpling, my son John
        Went to bed with his trowsers on;
        One shoe off, the other shoe on,
        Deedle, deedle, dumpling, my son John.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXV. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
